message:
🌱 Add external-secrets: PushSecret: option to add additional tags\labels mission (#798)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "external-secrets-1821-pushsecret-option-to-add-additional-tags-labels",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "external-secrets: PushSecret: option to add additional tags\\labels",
+    "description": "PushSecret: option to add additional tags\\labels. Requested by 9+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current external-secrets deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your external-secrets version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n external-secrets -l app.kubernetes.io/name=external-secrets\nhelm list -n external-secrets 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working external-secrets installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review external-secrets configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant external-secrets configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n external-secrets -l app.kubernetes.io/name=external-secrets\nkubectl get configmap -n external-secrets -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=external-secrets\n```\nI would like to be able to manage the tags that are set on the external secret when using PushSecret."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for PushSecret: option to add additional tags\\labels",
+        "description": "## Problem Statement\n\nI've designed the feature to attach metadata to the secrets managed by PushSecrets. The interface is not fixed at all, and I'm open to discussion \ud83d\ude42 \nRelates to https://github.com/external-secrets/external-secrets/issues/1821\nAdd the `metadata` field to the PushSecret\n```yaml\napiVersion: external-secrets.io/v1alpha1\nkind: PushSecret\nmetadata:\n  name: pushsecret-example\n  namespace: default\nspec:\n  refreshInterval: 10s\n  secretStoreRefs:\n    - name: cluster-secret-store\n      kind: ClusterSecretStore\n  selector:\n    secret:\n      name: test-secret\n  data:\n    - match:\n        secretKey: key1\n        remoteRef:\n          remoteKey: test1\n      metadata:\n        annotations:\n          key1: value1\n        labels:\n          key1: value1\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n external-secrets -l app.kubernetes.io/name=external-secrets\nkubectl get events -n external-secrets --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"PushSecret: option to add additional tags\\labels\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## Problem Statement\n\nI've designed the feature to attach metadata to the secrets managed by PushSecrets. The interface is not fixed at all, and I'm open to discussion \ud83d\ude42 \nRelates to https://github.com/external-secrets/external-secrets/issues/1821\nAdd the `metadata` field to the PushSecret manifest. An example manifest.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "apiVersion: external-secrets.io/v1alpha1\nkind: PushSecret\nmetadata:\n  name: pushsecret-example\n  namespace: default\nspec:\n  refreshInterval: 10s\n  secretStoreRefs:\n    - name: cluster-secret-store\n      kind: ClusterSecretStore\n  selector:\n    secret:\n      name: test-secret\n  data:\n    - match:\n        secretKey: key1\n        remoteRef:\n          remoteKey: test1\n      metadata:\n        annotations:\n          key1: value1\n        labels:\n          key1: value1"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "external-secrets",
+      "sandbox",
+      "security",
+      "feature"
+    ],

+    },
